room.caption: [G5-3M] If you find any lost items, articles or valuables, please leave them where they are, so that we may collect them later. Thank you.

instance.creationCode: bwBack=tileMetE bwLeft=160 bwTop=352 bwWidth=16 bwHeight=16 spIndex=sMetroidBlockBreak spImage=0

image_speed=0.33 soundToPlay=global.snd_MetItemGet stringToShow="You have obtained the Super High Jump Boots!#You can now jump even higher!" fadingTime=60 boxSize=2
if global.gameProgress>=2850 instance_destroy()
